commit.subject: Revert "LU-19427 llite: fix invalidate_lock deadlock for mixed BIO/DIO"
commit.message:
Revert "LU-19427 llite: fix invalidate_lock deadlock for mixed BIO/DIO"

This reverts commit 56e59cbb11d857fd8679aaf219ed744080fd75a0.
Otherwise, multiple threads can deadlock in invalidate_lock().

Change-Id: I8c623e8ba15fde3f72cad3e140f96667f3ba627b
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63148
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
